summary: A Go-based modular orchestration tool with a plugin system that detects conditions, runs assertions, and generates JUnit reports, likely for Kubernetes infrastructure validation.
concerns: high volume of automated agent session archival commits cluttering history
missing non-test implementation files in key_files list suggests possible thin wrappers or test-heavy codebase
scattered configuration across .claude, .gorchestra, and GOrchestra directories
suggestions: squash or rebase automated agent tracking commits to keep git history clean
consolidate configuration directories into a single standard location
ensure core logic files (detector.go, reporter.go, schema.go) have adequate test coverage matching the runner package
